race.comment: Former Victorian NAVY NINA (1) just ran into one better when having her first run for the new stable and will have come on with that outing now in the locker. Should find this easier than what she faced down south and is sure to be right there at the business end. The well-related SOME STYLE (4) (half to G1 winner Peeping) has placed three from three around this circuit and is more than capable enough on her day. Solid top-three prospects. CANARA (6) finished second over 1666m at Ipswich two back but missed the frame last time out over 1400m at Eagle Farm. In the mix on best. WAR IS BRUTAL (10) impressed with a 3.5 lengths win last start at Sunshine Coast over 1200m, albeit in an easier race. Watch for any market confidence. SHERAQUAY (7) next best despite the sticky draw.
